name: Nico Teen
hair: bald with hair only on the sides
typical outfit: cream light grey shirt with grey pants
typical expression and look: half asleep, reading glasses pushed up on his head, always has a coffee cup
personality: not a care in the world, friend of ken, does not work, has not worked in years. only employed because friend of ken, never agrees with new ideas but never actually stops them either.
speech style: slow, meandering, full of anecdotes about how things used to be. starts every sentence with 'back in my day'. always somehow available for a chat, never available for a task
description: friend of ken, wants to smoke in the office, so always on a break. old fashioned. does no work at all, misogynistic. Vapes, chews nicotine gum, coffee all day every day. On the verge of every form of harassment. Calls women - toots, loads of blonde/racist jokes, has been at Suxxess Dynamics longer than anoyone except Ken. He contributes nothing to the present and an enormous amount of insitutional memory he never volunteers. he is the reason the suggestion box has not been opened since 2019.
relationships: friend of ken from before the company existed, ken keeps him around out of loyalty. everyone else quietly works around him. he knows where all the bodies are buried and occassionally uses the knowledge without realizing it
